{{Expand}}

{{Infobox icon
| name = Valinhall emblem
| introduced = tg-03-city-of-light
}}

== City of Light ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The emblem of [[Valinhall]] is a Dragon’s [[Fang]], point-up, wrapped in chains.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c28">''City of Light'', chapter 28</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Icons]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
